tema: A1 Grand Review — All Topics Together

banco_oraciones.oracion: The people in Medellín are very friendly.
Look! Ben is recording a video right now.
A designer is a person who creates beautiful things.
Kenji loves Sofía's photos. He looks at them every day.
Where do you live? I live near the park.
Carmen is the woman who gives the best advice.
You should visit us in December — we can show you the city.

banner_diagnostico.opcion_a: The people in Medellín is very friendly.
banner_diagnostico.opcion_b: The people in Medellín are very friendly.

inicio.definicion_pragmatica: This is everything A1 gave you, working together: identity, routines, what's happening now, rules, advice and descriptions — one level, one story.

ejercicios.pregunta: Look! Ben ___ a video right now.
A designer is a person ___ creates beautiful things.
Kenji loves Sofía's photos. He looks at ___ every day.

ejercicios.afirmacion: 'A library is a place where you can read' is correct.

ejercicios.texto: Sofía is busy now — she ___ working on a poster.
Carmen is the woman ___ gives the best advice.
Ben never arrives ___ time for class.

ejercicios.respuesta: Kenji is a student who studies hard.

ejercicios.instruccion: Say it is happening right now (add 'right now').
ejercicios.respuesta: Sofía is designing posters right now.

ejercicios.oracion_base: A teacher is a person. A teacher helps students.
ejercicios.respuesta: A teacher is a person who helps students.

ejercicios.pregunta: Describe your city: 'My city is a place where...'
ejercicios.respuesta: My city is a place where people are friendly.

ejercicios.pregunta: What are you doing right now? (I am...)

guion: Sofía: Kenji, what are you doing? We have to leave at seven!
Kenji: I'm packing my camera. Ben is recording a goodbye video in the garden.
Sofía: Of course he is. He never does anything on time.
Carmen: Boys! You should eat something before the trip.
Kenji: Carmen, you are the person who taught me the most important word in Spanish.
Kenji: Familia. This is a house where everyone is family.

comprension.pregunta: What is Ben doing in the garden?
What does Kenji call Carmen's house?
opciones: A house where everyone is family
comprension.respuesta: A house where everyone is family

reading.texto: It is Kenji's last week in Medellín, and everyone is busy. Sofía is designing a photo album — she is the friend who never forgets a detail. Ben is planning the party, which is dangerous, because Ben can't plan anything. Carmen is cooking all day; you can smell the arepas from the street. 'You shouldn't be sad,' she tells Kenji. 'People who love each other always meet again.' Kenji smiles. He has to go home, but he knows this is not a goodbye. It is a 'see you later'.

preguntas.afirmacion: Sofía is designing a photo album.
Ben is very good at planning parties.
Kenji thinks this is a final goodbye.
